description_long: This object is a flat, rectangular surface featuring a highly detailed, photorealistic print of a beach scene with sand, ocean waves, and a night sky filled with celestial bodies such as the moon and planets. The surface is smooth and appears to be made of a thin, rigid material, possibly a printed mat or decorative panel. The edges are straight and clean, with no visible thickness or raised features. There are no discernible mechanical or functional parts such as a barrel, stock, or magazine, nor any elements typical of a rifle. The object is entirely two-dimensional in appearance, with the artwork dominating its visual presence. Its overall form and lack of three-dimensional structure suggest it is not a weapon but rather a decorative or illustrative piece.
description: A flat, rectangular panel with a detailed beach and night sky print, lacking any rifle features. The surface is smooth and visually dominated by the printed scene.
description_view_0: The panel displays a beach scene with waves and celestial bodies, viewed from an angle that emphasizes the ocean and sky.
description_view_1: This view highlights the sandy shore and the transition to the ocean, with the night sky visible in the background.
description_view_2: The celestial elements and deep blue ocean are most prominent, with the sandy beach less visible.
description_view_3: The sandy beach and shoreline are more visible, with the ocean and night sky receding into the background.
